query: SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) AS value_length, CASE WHEN configValue IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN configValue = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END AS status FROM site_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'line_%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 28JPo3Vw26mPY6V.root --database XBhqXuJ2WiY8ShtDj5vvMz --execute SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) AS value_length, CASE WHEN configValue IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN configValue = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE 'HAS_VALUE' END AS status FROM site_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'line_%';
stdout:

line_login_enabled	4	HAS_VALUE
line_channel_id	10	HAS_VALUE
